justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified 'next Monday' as June 8th, 2026, and handled the user's slight time preference change from 8 AM to 9 AM effectively.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent offered two relevant alternative slots when the user's preferred time was unavailable, allowing the user to choose.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered the necessary information and booked the appointment without unnecessary turns or redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent successfully booking the desired appointment after offering suitable alternatives.
